name: proofkit
description: Proofkit — a self-contained, toggleable, portable content-review tool: an on-page click-to-comment overlay + admin dashboard + Cloudflare Worker. A framework-neutral core/ (plain JS/CSS + standalone HTML) with a thin Astro adapter, injectable into any Astro / Claude Code website project — or any stack via the standalone entries.

design.note: Design system — colour/theme tokens (3 skins keyed by [data-pk-theme]) + reusable .pk-* component classes. Single source of truth for colour; reference/ is inspiration only.

core.note: Framework-neutral. Standalone *.html entries load these directly (window.PROOFKIT_WORKER_URL global).

hostSeams: one gated line in the shared layout (renders <ProofkitOverlay /> when PROOFKIT_ENABLED)
PUBLIC_REVIEW_WORKER_URL build env (CI) — optional, enables shared store
hostRequirements: For the Astro adapter: Astro (static or hybrid) with a shared layout that accepts an `seo` prop + default <slot/>, and an SEO type at src/lib/seo (adjust the import in config.ts if elsewhere)
For non-Astro hosts: none — serve core/*.html (or wire core/*.js yourself) and set window.PROOFKIT_WORKER_URL
Cloudflare account for the Worker (optional; runs in localStorage demo mode without it)
